title: Refactor OCP-030 (OCP): Switch statement on Colour::Code enum violates OCP.

detected_issue.description: Switch statement on Colour::Code enum violates OCP.
detected_issue.reasoning: Similar to Win32ColourImpl, the 'use' method in ANSIColourImpl contains a switch statement that dispatches logic based on the 'Colour::Code' enum. This directly violates OCP because introducing a new color code would necessitate modifying and recompiling this existing method, rather than extending the system with new behavior without altering existing code.
